Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.input.keyboard

Class FlixelKey

java.lang.Object
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.input.keyboard.FlixelKey
public final class FlixelKey extends Object
Keyboard key codes used for FlixelKeyInputManager. Values match Input.Keys for backwards compatibility with libGDX.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static int
    fromString(String keyname)
    Resolves a key name (as returned by toString(int) or Input.Keys.toString(int)) to a key code.
    static String
    toString(int keycode)
    Returns a human-readable string for the given key code.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

      • Constant Field Values

    • MAX_KEYCODE

      public static final int MAX_KEYCODE
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Method Details

    • fromString

      public static int fromString(String keyname)
      Resolves a key name (as returned by toString(int) or Input.Keys.toString(int)) to a key code.
      Parameters:
      keyname - Key name from toString(int).
      Returns:
      The key code, or NONE if not found.

    • toString

      public static String toString(int keycode)
      Returns a human-readable string for the given key code.
      Parameters:
      keycode - Key code from this class (same values as Input.Keys).
      Returns:
      Human-readable key name, or "NONE" if the key code is NONE or "ANY" if the key code is ANY.
